mapper.select: SELECT * FROM new_video_info WHERE enable = 1 AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM new_video_info WHERE parent_device_id = #{parentDeviceId} AND enable = 1 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO new_video_info ( name, device_type, ip, port, username, password, channel, channel_name, stream_type, stream_code, rtsp_port, rtsp_url, parent_device_id, enable, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deviceType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{port,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{channel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{channelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{streamType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{streamCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rtspPort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rtspUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentDeviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enable,jdbcType=TINYINT}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO new_video_info ( name, device_type, ip, port, username, password, channel, channel_name, stream_type, stream_code, rtsp_port, rtsp_url, parent_device_id, enable, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{v.name}, #{v.deviceType}, #{v.ip}, #{v.port}, #{v.username}, #{v.password}, #{v.channel}, #{v.channelName}, #{v.streamType}, #{v.streamCode}, #{v.rtspPort}, #{v.rtspUrl}, #{v.parentDeviceId}, #{v.enable}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE new_video_info SET name = #{name}, device_type = #{deviceType}, ip = #{ip}, port = #{port}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, channel = #{channel}, channel_name = #{channelName}, stream_type = #{streamType}, stream_code = #{streamCode}, rtsp_port = #{rtspPort}, rtsp_url = #{rtspUrl}, parent_device_id = #{parentDeviceId}, enable = #{enable}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE new_video_info SET parent_device_id = NULL WHERE parent_device_id IN
#{id}
